response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web/backend work. No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB and generic SQL only), and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Strong generalist engineer, but the role's mandatory technical and domain requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad full-stack engineering experience across 15+ years
Strong testing/TDD discipline and DevOps exposure (CI/CD, Docker)
Some early-career C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a Windows-based IDE
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
